top_posts.author: Alead
top_posts.title: We are excited to invite AWS Partners to AWS PartnerEquip: Live
top_posts.preview: Close menu. We are excited to invite AWS Partners to AWS PartnerEquip: Live - Dubai, 24 - 26 March 2026. ... Artificial Intelligence
top_posts.draft_comment: Specialization pathways are the wrong framing for most partners, they optimize for badge depth while the market actually rewards breadth. In healthcare and education transformation work across the GCC, the partners who win multi-year contracts have vertical depth (industry-specific configs, compliance playbooks) not just technical badges. Curious whether 2026 criteria shifts the bar for partners still building their first competency vs. those expanding existing ones.

top_posts.author: Kemisolagabriel
top_posts.title: Kemi Gabriel, MBA, PMP®'s Post - LinkedIn
top_posts.preview: The 8th edition of the program starts on March 24, 2026. ... Digital Security | Global Identity & Access Management | Global Compliance |
top_posts.draft_comment: The accidental PM path is more common than the profession admits, and often produces stronger practitioners precisely because they learned through consequence not curriculum. I transitioned from engineering into a PMO role managing a 15-hospital digital transformation program, and the lack of formal training forced habits that certifications never teach: reading the room, protecting scope without burning bridges, and knowing when to escalate before the problem becomes the crisis. What is the one skill you learned outside formal PM training that you still lean on most?

top_posts.author: Emma Jordaan
top_posts.title: UAE HR Webinar: Employee Rights, Engagement & Leadership in ...
top_posts.preview: UAE HR Webinar: Employee Rights, Engagement & Leadership in Uncertain Times ... Tuesday, 24th March 2026 Time: 1:00pm (UAE time) Register here
top_posts.draft_comment: Uncertain times sharpen the divide between compliance-driven HR and genuinely adaptive organizations. Most HR functions treat employee rights as a checkbox, then wonder why engagement metrics plateau. In large transformation programs, the HR function that governs change management alongside legal compliance consistently outperforms on adoption speed. Is the webinar addressing how HR leaders can move from reactive protection to proactive design of the employee experience?

top_posts.author: Mohammed Salman 3741A9B4
top_posts.title: Mohammed Salman's Post - LinkedIn
top_posts.preview: I'll be in Dubai until March 24th, 2026, along with my co-founder Mohmed AbuBacker Samsudeen We're looking to meet: • Interior design firms
top_posts.draft_comment: Interior design in the GCC runs on relationship depth as much as portfolio quality, especially for commercial and hospitality fit-outs where specifiers have long-standing supplier networks. Have you identified which design studios or fit-out firms in Dubai are actively looking for manufacturing partners versus those already saturated with supplier relationships? The answer changes your entire outreach strategy.
